description: Configure Stellarium to simulate the night sky over ancient Lesbos on January 25, 570 BCE (astronomical year -569) at 22:15:00 UTC to validate Sappho's 'Midnight Poem' (Fragment 52). Set the observer location to Mytilene, Lesbos, Greece (39.11° N, 26.55° E, Altitude: 10m). The visual display must have the Atmosphere disabled, the Azimuthal Grid enabled, and Constellation Art enabled. Center the view on the Pleiades (M45) and save these location and display settings to the application configuration. Capture a screenshot of the simulation and write a lecture summary to ~/Desktop/sappho_lecture.txt including the keywords 'Sappho', 'Lesbos', '570', and 'Pleiades'.
